transcription.text: I'm modern. And when my little Rodney has a cold, he gets a pill. It's modern. I'm modern too. And when my little Betsy has a cold, I rub in Vicks VapoRub. Most comforting thing you can do for a cold. My pills help relieve nasal congestion. VapoRub's famous for that. My pills give fast continuous relief. So does Vicks VapoRub. Well, my pills are easier to give. Maybe. But when I comfort my child with Vicks VapoRub, I can almost see the vapors penetrate down deep. Once you relax, warm up, feel better. VapoRub's so loving, so right. For continuous comfort to sleep all night through, Vicks VapoRub. Most comforting. Comforting thing you can do for a cold. Even grown-up colds.
